meaning: n.漏洞,漏出,漏出物,泄漏,<俚>撒尿vi.漏,泄漏vt.使渗漏
examples: Water had started to leak into the cellar.
More details are now beginning to leak out.
Crews are working to plug a major oil leak.
Because this leak is unique and unprecedented, it could take many days to stop.
In the week prior to the announcement of the leak, someone tried to hack its encrypted chat channel.
